destination.name: Portugal
destination.tagline: From Port and the Douro to Vinho Verde, Dao and Madeira
destination.overview: Portugal pours one of Europe's most distinctive wine maps: fortified Port and bold reds from the terraced Douro, crisp Vinho Verde in the green north, structured Dao and Bairrada in the centre, ripe Alentejo in the south, and volcanic Madeira in the Atlantic.
destination.hero_image_credit: Photo by PRA on Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 3.0
destination.hero_image_alt: Terraced vineyards above the Douro river in Portugal's Port wine country

index.title: Portugal wine regions | Cork & Curve
index.description: Explore Portugal's wine regions on Cork & Curve, from the terraced Douro and Port lodges to Vinho Verde, Dao, Bairrada, Alentejo and Madeira.
